tagline: By-appointment therapeutic massage in downtown Santa Rosa with Michelle Martinez, CAMTC-certified.
seoDescription: Oasis Touch Massage in downtown Santa Rosa: Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone & CBD massage by appointment with Michelle Martinez.
heroHeading: Therapeutic massage for a pain-free lifestyle
heroSubheading: Relaxation, stress relief, and lasting pain relief through customized therapeutic massage and bodywork in downtown Santa Rosa. By appointment only.
highlights: By-appointment sessions with focused, one-on-one attention
Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and CBD massage plus add-ons
aboutBody: Oasis Touch Massage Therapy is a small, by-appointment practice in downtown Santa Rosa led by Michelle Martinez, a CAMTC-certified massage therapist and AMTA member. Her mission is to promote relaxation, stress relief, and a pain-free lifestyle through therapeutic massage and bodywork.

Working part-time, Michelle offers each client unhurried, one-on-one care from her studio at 509 7th St, Suite 100. Sessions can be tailored from gentle Swedish work to focused deep tissue, with add-ons like cupping, reflexology, and red light therapy. New clients receive $15 off their first session.

services.title: Swedish Massage
services.description: Oils or lotion combined with rolling, kneading, and percussion strokes for full-body relaxation (70 or 90 min).

services.title: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: Targeted pressure to relieve tension held in the deeper layers of muscle and tissue (70 or 90 min).

services.title: Hot Stone Massage
services.description: Heated stones placed on key points of the body to deepen relaxation and promote circulation (70 or 90 min).

services.title: CBD Massage
services.description: THC-free massage enriched with certified organic CBD extract plus organic hempseed and jojoba oils (70 or 90 min).

services.title: 30-Minute Targeted Massage
services.description: Focused work on one specific area of the body for quick, concentrated relief.

services.title: Add-On Treatments
services.description: Enhance any session with cupping, reflexology, red light therapy, a sugar scrub, or a complimentary face massage.

notes: Address: 509 7th St Suite 100, Santa Rosa, CA 95401. Practitioner: Michelle Martinez, CAMTC #86001, AMTA #1789802, MEC25-0002. Also has TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@oasistouch.massage. No rating/review count could be verified on Google/Yelp, so rating omitted. Hours are part-time, by-appointment-only on Sun/Tue/Wed/Fri (no clock times published). Established year not found. Pricing (from site, for context): Swedish/Deep Tissue 70min $155 / 90min $175; Hot Stone & CBD 70min $160 / 90min $180; 30-min targeted $95; add-ons: cupping $45, reflexology $45, red light $30, sugar scrub $45, face massage free. New-client $15 off first session. 726094.png is the logo (excluded from photos). Some service-page images are stock template assets (/massage/images/shared/) and were excluded; only the business's own /images/sites/33481/ uploads were kept.
